summary: This update introduces keybinding shortcuts and utility improvements across article viewing and feed editing.
highlights: Use 'C' keybind to copy article links quickly.
Feed Editor now displays and allows editing of URLs.
Added toggle to control list wrap-around scrolling.
Fixed clipping issues in article title previews.

summary: This update introduces better visibility into content history and improves the user experience across category and saved views.
highlights: New Changelog+About tab shows version history.
Added age column to article previews.
Improved category view footer with stats.
Better performance for saved and category content.

summary: Stability updates and quality-of-life improvements for a better user experience.
highlights: Saved list now grows when footer is empty
Minor bug fixes and UI improvements

summary: Introduces version checking, an "All Feeds" virtual entry, improved navigation controls, and various UI fixes and enhancements.
highlights: Version check popup with release highlights
"All Feeds" virtual entry showing all articles
Arrow keys toggle boolean settings consistently
Minor bug fixes and UI improvements

summary: Introducing a full theme editor with live customization and improved UI navigation features.
highlights: Full theme editor for browsing, creating, and exporting themes
Scrollbars now show fractional position indicators for smoother navigation
Visible text cursor in all input fields with arrow key support

summary: Improves feed refreshing, view population, article age indicators, and navigation limits in settings and editors.
highlights: Refreshes all feeds when "All Feeds" is selected
Correctly populates "All Feeds" on startup and after fetch
Shows article age badges in All Feeds and categories
Stops scroll loop at top/bottom of Settings and Feed Editor

summary: Improved UI responsiveness and readability in update popup and feed list.
highlights: Scrolling in update popup now responds instantly
Feed list scrollbar accurately tracks position
Long bullet points wrap with hanging indent
Minor bug fixes and UI improvements
